subcodes.first_line: O Abu'l-Qásim! Art thou aware of Him Who maketh mention of thee from the horizon of the Prison, and dost thou behold Him Who hath turned toward thee from His station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اباالقاسم هل تعرف من یذکرک من افق السجن و هل تری من اقبل الیک من مقامه
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @suffering and imprisonment, @imagery in the Qur'an, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @living waters; water of life
